_meta.source: checked-in NFL results and immutable nflverse stats_team weekly cache, regular season only
notes: Internal Stage-1 final-eight team metrics artifact.
Windows use dateUtc ascending, then week ascending, then gameId ascending.
Playoffs are excluded; Week 18 is included when it is among the last eight completed games.
Window z-scores use the full-season league distributions.
L8 opponent strength is the mean full-season adjusted composite of the selected opponents.
The alternate flagged view never replaces canonical metrics.

contextFlags.note: Week 18 margin screen: actual -31, prior mean -1.313, prior standard deviation 10.073, threshold 2.
Week 18 margin screen: actual 31, prior mean 2.75, prior standard deviation 13.098, threshold 2.
